ddls:
CREATE TABLE "consoles" (
  "console_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each console */,
  "console_name" TEXT /* Name of the console */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the console */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the console was released */,
  "console_model" TEXT /* Model of the console */,
  "console_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the console */,
  "console_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the console's image */,
  "discontinued_year" INTEGER /* Year the console was discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("console_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "console_id" INTEGER /* ID of the console the game was released on */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "box_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the box art image */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB rating of the game */,
  "multiplayer" INTEGER /* Whether the game supports multiplayer */,
  "cooperative" INTEGER /* Whether the game supports cooperative play */,
  "single_player" INTEGER /* Whether the game supports single-player */,
  "online_play" INTEGER /* Whether the game supports online play */,
  "platform_exclusive" INTEGER /* Whether the game is exclusive to the platform */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer */,
  "wiki_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's wiki page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_console_id FOREIGN KEY ("console_id") REFERENCES consoles ("console_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game release */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being released */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the game was released */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "region_exclusive" INTEGER /* Whether the game was exclusive to the region */,
  "platform_version" TEXT /* Version of the platform the game was released on */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes or additional information */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the game at the time of release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_releases_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_saves" (
  "save_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game save */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the save is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the save */,
  "save_data" TEXT /* Save data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the save was uploaded */,
  "save_slot" INTEGER /* Save slot number */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game the save is for */,
  "save_description" TEXT /* Description of the save */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("save_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_saves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_saves_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cheats" (
  "cheat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cheat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the cheat is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the cheat */,
  "cheat_code" TEXT /* Cheat code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cheat */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the cheat was uploaded */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game the cheat is for */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the cheat has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cheat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cheats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cheats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "walkthroughs" (
  "walkthrough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each walkthrough */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the walkthrough is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the walkthrough */,
  "walkthrough_text" TEXT /* Walkthrough text */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the walkthrough was uploaded */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game the walkthrough is for */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the walkthrough has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("walkthrough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walkthroughs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_walkthroughs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is verified */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the game */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game the rating is for */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the rating has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketplace" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketplace item */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being sold */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., game, console, merchandise) */,
  "item_condition" TEXT /* Detailed condition of the item */,
  "item_images_urls" TEXT /* URLs of images of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "item_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the item is available for purchase */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "sold_date" TEXT /* Date the item was sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketplace_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketplace_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the item was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES marketplace ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thread the post belongs to */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "thread_title" TEXT /* Title of the thread */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "post_views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the post */,
  "post_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post received */,
  "post_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the post received */,
  "post_replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "post_edit_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last edited */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
